expectations.evidence: Response starts with 'Your test intent is well-defined' and explicitly says 'No follow-up questions needed. Moving straight to collection.'
Highlighted 'max_requests likely needs to be bumped to 4 or higher. The default is typically 3, which would cause your 4th copytool to queue.'
Multiple markdown tables: HSM Readiness, Concurrency Capacity, Data Path, Subsystem mapping
Dedicated 'Concurrency Capacity' section with thread pools, LDLM contention, OSC/MDC pipeline depths, and concern about single MDT serialization
